channel.title: Stars on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Stars on Arrans github.io

item.title: wez/wezterm
item.description: A GPU-accelerated cross-platform terminal emulator and multiplexer written by @wez and implemented in Rust

item.title: saoudrizwan/claude-dev
item.description: Autonomous software engineer right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, executing commands, and more with your permission every step of the way.

item.title: langchain-ai/langchain
item.description: 🦜🔗 Build context-aware reasoning applications

item.title: massgravel/Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
item.description: A Windows and Office activator using HWID / Ohook / KMS38 / Online KMS activation methods, with a focus on open-source code and fewer antivirus detections.

item.title: nektos/act
item.description: Run your GitHub Actions locally 🚀

item.title: vllm-project/vllm
item.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

item.description: Deliver Go binaries as fast and easily as possible

item.description: 🐚 OpenDevin: Code Less, Make More

item.description: Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.

item.description: Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs

item.description: Chat with your documents on your local device using GPT models. No data leaves your device and 100% private.

item.description: Like cURL, but for gRPC: Command-line tool for interacting with gRPC servers

item.title: janhq/jan
item.description: Jan is an open source alternative to ChatGPT that runs 100% offline on your computer. Multiple engine support (llama.cpp, TensorRT-LLM)

item.title: xournalpp/xournalpp
item.description: Xournal++ is a handwriting notetaking software with PDF annotation support. Written in C++ with GTK3, supporting Linux (e.g. Ubuntu, Debian, Arch, SUSE), macOS and Windows 10. Supports pen input from devices such as Wacom Tablets.
